mapper.insert: insert into stats_daily ( stat_date, pv, uv, article_view_count, event_count, updated_at ) select #{statDate}, count(case when event_type = 'pageview' then 1 end), count(distinct case when event_type = 'pageview' then visitor_id end), count(case when event_type = 'pageview' and article_id is not null then 1 end), count(*), current_timestamp from visit_events where cast(created_at as date) = #{statDate}

insert into stats_article_daily ( stat_date, article_id, pv, uv, view_count_delta, updated_at ) select #{statDate}, article_id, count(*), count(distinct visitor_id), count(*), current_timestamp from visit_events where cast(created_at as date) = #{statDate} and event_type = 'pageview' and article_id is not null group by article_id
mapper.select: select count(*) from stats_article_daily where stat_date = #{statDate}
